## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Change Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Scope

- [ ] Main process (`src/main/**`)
- [ ] Preload (`src/preload/**`)
- [ ] Renderer/UI (`src/**` React/Tailwind)
- [ ] Build/CI/Release
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

Please confirm local checks were run:

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`

## Risk and Impact

- Any risky area affected?
- Any migration or backward-compatibility concern?

- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changed (attach screenshots/GIFs below)

- [ ] Needed (describe concise user-facing notes)
